entry.title: Re: BI2025: Side-by-Side Migration vs. In-Place Update.
entry.content:
I agree with the previous comment - an in-place upgrade can be suitable in many situations, especially if your BI 4.3 landscape is relatively new and your systems team is happy with the OS version it's sitting on. If you look closely at the About screen, BI 2025 is technically just BI 4.4.

But especially if you're already in the cloud, side-by-side means that there's virtually zero disruption to users until you're ready to go live. Then the old virtual hardware can be easily decommissioned.

entry.title: Re: Hello. I have a question regarding UI5 ColorPalette.
entry.content:
Hello, have you used any custom functions to manipulate the functionality? If not then please raise an internal incident for this component "CA-UI5-CTR"

Let me know if you need more help

entry.title: SAP Cloud ALM Solution Process
entry.content: Is there any way in SAP Cloud ALM that we can add a solution process that is only specific to Private Cloud to a Public Cloud in SAP Cloud ALM? Thanks

entry.title: Fiori Elements RAP Attachment (LOB) Upload Not Refreshing UI Automatically
entry.content:
Hello,

I have a Fiori Elements app (List Report and Object Page) built with a managed, draft enabled ABAP RAP business object, exposed in an OData V4 service. The root entity includes an attachment (LOB) field. 

When I upload an attachment via the Object Page, the new file only becomes visible after I manually refresh the page. This happens both in the deployed app and in the SAP Business Application Studio (BAS) preview. However, in the Eclipse ADT preview, the new attachment shows up immediately after upload (no manual refresh needed). Moreover, if I expose the exact same RAP BO in a OData V2 service, the problem also does not occur in the deployed app.

I noticed that:

  • In the Eclipse ADT preview, the $batch request executed after file upload contains both a PATCH (for the upload) and a follow-up GET (which refreshes the entity/attachment list).

  • In the deployed app/BAS preview, the batch request only contains the PATCH; the GET is missing, so the UI doesn’t update until I refresh.

However, the SAP UI5 framework version is same in all environments (1.120.15).

I attempted to solve this using side-effects (both in the BDEF and in the XML annotations), but without any success.

Does anyone know what might cause the difference and/or how it can be solved?

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Re: Mass MRP Area assignment in Material master SAP S/4 HANA 1709
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

We are facing issues related to MRP Area definition

MRP Area: Create Material Assignments Automatically

If this checkbox is selected, you activate the automatic assignment of materials to the storage location MRP area as soon as the material is maintained for one of the storage locations of the MRP area.

With the above checkbox indicator set, wherever the material is extended or created to the relevant storage location then MRP Area needs to be assigned along with other details.

Did anyone faced similar issue and what action was taken

Regards

Nitin Desai

entry.title: Re: Change created own overhead rate in costing sheet
entry.content:
Hi,

just to add to what my colleague already said: it is sadly not possible to delete your overhead rate P200 itself and a change of the dependency is also not possible after creation. If you want to have a custom overhead rate with another dependency, you have to delete all entries for P200 in the costing sheet and recreate a new one with the correct dependency.

Best regards
Marvin

entry.title: Re: Multiple clicks on the button press - UI5
entry.content:
A little bit late, but I think this answer can help other developers. 
You can prevent the double click by setting the Busy Indicator (with delay 0, default is 1000ms I think). This is not available on a button but e.g. on a dialog or a panel. So it is important that you choose  the wrapper component around the button to set the busy indicator and not the button itself.
https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/sdk/#/entity/sap.ui.core.Control/sample/sap.ui.core.sample.ControlBusyIndicator/code

entry.title: Kickstart your SAP Signavio Process Transformation Manager adoption with our new e-learning
entry.content:
Hello SAP Signavio community,

SAP Signavio Value Map team is excited to announce that we have released our new SAP Signavio Process Transformation Manager E-Learning from the SAP Signavio Adoption Starter series.

What is the session about?

Dive into the essentials of SAP Signavio Process Transformation Manager with this e-learning course designed to accelerate your understanding and adoption. As a new addition to the SAP Signavio Transformation Suite, the Process Transformation Manager enables you to collaboratively plan, manage, and execute transformation initiatives leading to quantifiable success. Empower your organization to take advantage of the centralized and collaborative improvements, value-driven decision-making, and quantifiable business value through continuous improvements. Perfect for business analysts, process managers, and IT professionals seeking to enhance decision-making and operational efficiency.

What are the session goals?

  • Learn how to set up SAP Signavio Process Transformation Manager
  • Understand process transformation management
  • Understand the SAP Signavio Process Transformation Manager Capabilities

How to get in?

If you haven't yet signed up for the SAP Enterprise Support Academy and Value Maps, don't worry, we've got you covered! Get started with SAP Enterprise Support Academy and Value Maps here. (Check out our step-by-step instructional video on how to join SAP Enterprise Support Academy and Value maps.)

Direct link to the new E-Learning session:

SAP Signavio Adoption Starter: Process Transformation Manager

Do you need any additional help?

Don't hesitate to get in touch with our team using the following form. (Please select the "SAP Signavio | Business Process Transformation" topic).

Happy learning!

entry.title: Re: Learning License User Types in SAP SuccessFactors Learning
entry.content:
@kchamarthy I see that it states that the license type on matters for reporting and licensing only. Can you confirm there is no impact to the end user. Functional license users can still take learning courses that require for compliance? Is there anything else to be aware of 

Support told me when I asked about any impact to end users... "We highly advise that you consult with a certified Learning implementation partner to assist you and answer any question you may have in relation to this setup/configuration." It seems quite simple from the steps outlined in this blog post why would I need to talk to an implementation partner?

We have X0 as MRP Type at the plant level.

Nitin D

Main file Naming Format: abc.TXT
Done/completion File Format: abc_CMPL.TXT

What should be the format of Done file Naming. Seems it only supports when extension is .done.

Please suggest

entry.title: Re: MRP Area: Create Material Assignments Automatically
entry.content:
Did you also assign the profile to the MRP Area in the MRP Area customizing (transaction OMIZ)

(Please add a tag relevant to your SAP version: ERP, S/4HANA, cloud, etc.)

entry.title: Re: Deploying Fiori application on S4 side on premise edi...
entry.content:
yes OData is mandatory.

via SEGW or using RAP

in SEGW->Call function best option I believe to consume RFC as is...

METHOD userdetail_get_entity.

  DATA: ls_userdetails TYPE bapiaddr3,
        lt_return     TYPE TABLE OF bapiret2.

  DATA: lv_username TYPE sy-uname.

  " Get input from request
  io_tech_request_context->get_converted_keys( IMPORTING es_key_values = DATA(ls_keys) ).
  lv_username = ls_keys-username.

  CALL FUNCTION 'BAPI_USER_GET_DETAIL'
    EXPORTING
      username = lv_username
    IMPORTING
      address  = ls_userdetails
    TABLES
      return   = lt_return.

  " Map to entity structure
  er_entity = VALUE #( 
    username  = lv_username
    firstname = ls_userdetails-firstname
    lastname  = ls_userdetails-lastname
    email     = ls_userdetails-e_mail
  ).

ENDMETHOD.

thanks

entry.title: Re: Service Quotation in SAP S4 HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Hello @Melissa_Pineda 

Thank you for your follow-up.


The app you are looking for is "Service Quotation Items - Analytical List Page" (App ID: F6459). Please ensure the following when searching for the app in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition,

  • You are assigned the necessary business role – typically, SAP_BR_SERVICE_MANAGER or a custom role with access to service analytics.
  • You are searching under "All Applications" in the App Finder or via the App Library.
  • If the name doesn't produce results, could you try searching by the App ID F6459?


Unfortunately, I cannot share a screenshot directly here, but if the app is not visible to you, it may be due to role restrictions or scope item activation (e.g. scope item 4GA – Service Quotation Processing must be active).
Please let me know if you need further assistance system.


Best regards,
Chuma

entry.title: Custom Fields in Contract Cash Flow (Fiori App F5491)
entry.content:
Dear Community,
I have created some additional fields for RE-FX Contracts in the “Custom Fields and Logic” app (F1481) and activated them for all possible objects.
The fields are available in the “Contract Management” app (F5273), for example, and I can also make them visible and use them in the SAP GUI by customizing the sections/screens and Badis etc..
However, the fields are not visible in the APP “Contract Cash Flow” (F5491), although they are visible in the GUI transaction REISCDCF.
Do any of you know the reason for this? Is there anything I can do to get the additional fields into the report?

Thanks in advance for any advice!

Regards
Rado

entry.title: Re: EDIT HIRE RECORD BY IMPORT

But please make sure in imported file, seq-number is set as 1, then it is able to import. If seq-number is empty, then error will reports.

entry.title: How to Create Previous year key figure Linked to Current year figure in Custom Analytical Query?
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

We have a requirement to Create Previous year which should be fetch automatically  from Current Year, while creating Query in Custom Analytical query app.

For example-

Suppose we are in fiscal year 2025, while fetching data from query user will input only current year, on the basis of which Previous year should automatically be fetched.

How can this be achieved through Custom analytical query.

Thanks and Regards,

Mayank Gupta

entry.title: Re: Feasibility of Assigning Different Smart Forms to the...
entry.content:
Hello @VA19 

Thank you for your question.

In SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, standard configuration does not support assigning different smart forms to the same billing type based on sales area. The Output Parameter Determination (OPD) framework primarily uses parameters such as Billing Type, Sales Organisation, and Customer to determine output forms.

However, you might consider the following approaches:

  1. Utilise Available OPD Parameters: Leverage existing parameters like Sales Organisation within OPD to differentiate from assignments where possible.
  2. Custom Logic Implementation: If further differentiation is needed, explore the possibility of implementing custom logic using Business Add-Ins (BAdIs), such as SD_BIL_OUTPUT_PARAM_MODIFY, to select forms based on sales area dynamically.
  3. Form Template Enhancements: Incorporate conditional logic within Adobe Form templates to adjust content or layout based on sales area information.

For detailed guidance on configuring Output Parameter Determination, please refer to the SAP Help Portal:

Output Parameter Determination – SAP Help Portal

If you require assistance, please feel free to reach out.

Best regards

entry.title: "IMPORT FAILED" error - Can't import project from Build Apps standard plan
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

We upgraded from Build Apps free plan to Build Apps standard plan following this: https://help.sap.com/docs/build-apps/service-guide/upgrade-to-sap-build-apps-standard-edition?q=import

We had 56 projects in the free plan, that we exported as recommended in order to import them back to Build Apps standard plan once installed.

However, instead of having 0 project in the brand new standard plan like in the tutorial video, we noticed that 19 projects were already listed there. We tried to import a project but we keep having the following error message (despite the fact the so called project is NOT in the project list of the Build lobby):

IMPORT FAILED
Project eu10.yjdhdjdj… already exists
Correlation Id: 748h67….

We saw the following note but unless mistaken it seems to suggest no solution: https://me.sap.com/notes/0003521702

Just contacted SAP Support about it but if anyone of you knows how to fix this, that would be really appreciated.

Thanks,

BR,

LM.

entry.title: Re: MRP Area: Create Material Assignments Automatically
entry.content: MARD entry for the corresponding Storage location was not present (for other sloc., it was). At plant level MRP type is X0

entry.title: Putting people at the heart of change management to achieve successful digital transformation
entry.content:
For 150 years, Heidelberg Materials has been committed to driving progress. With more than 51,000 employees at almost 3,000 sites in more than 50 countries, the company ranks among the largest integrated producers of building materials and solutions globally, including leading market positions in cement, aggregates, and ready-mixed concrete. Its products and services are used in the construction of houses, infrastructure, and commercial and industrial facilities. 

To remain an industry leader and foster future innovation, Heidelberg Materials has initiated its ASCEND Program, which focuses on transitioning its ERP system to a cloud-based platform. The success of this initiative largely relies on ensuring employee buy-in and minimizing business disruption. To facilitate this process, Heidelberg Materials leverages its own expertise by partnering with trusted experts and support services to ensure that these transformative changes are centered around enhancing the human experience.

Before: Challenges and opportunities 

  • Prepare for a major IT systems transformation to ensure industry-leading technology innovation, with the aim to leverage an organizational change management approach
  • Plan for the use of modern digital engagement tools and data-driven insights to ensure transparency into the effectiveness of change management and engagement activities, enabling a focus on the most impactful actions and facilitating a people-centric approach

Why SAP

  • Scalable, data-driven approach to deploying SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition using SAP Organizational Change Management services and deep transformation insight
  • SAP Advisory Services portfolio to facilitate a clear understanding of focus areas, putting people at the center
  • Alignment with the hybrid, agile approach from SAP Services and Support
  • Early risk identification and proactive mitigation to support user adoption and project success

After: Value-driven results

  • Implementation and orchestration of employee engagement feedback architecture using a structured change-sentiment framework across project and organizational units, including iteration measurements at critical project milestones
  • Clear insights into stakeholder reception and experiences throughout the project lifecycle
  • Usage of the insights gained as the basis for precise actions to speed up and support solution adoption

SAP.com URL: https://www.sap.com/documents/2025/03/a647b378-f87e-0010-bca6-c68f7e60039b.html

Rückblick auf das SAP Training und Change Forum 2024 mit Aufnahmen, Folien und Podcasts

Lightning Talk: Build the foundation for sustainable SAP S/4HANA transformation with change management (Slides I Recording)

entry.title: Re: RELEASE STRATEGY PURCHASE REQUISITION
entry.content:
Hi Expert

I have deleted the values and checked the single value box. However, in the CL24N when saving, it shows the following inconsistency

 

CL24N Strategy 

The solution I proposed, based on adding values to the characteristic, is only functional for the release strategy in which it is required not to determine the strategy when the item has a contract number, and to determine it when it does not.

However, this solution does not apply to other service requisition release strategies, where the strategy is required to be determined regardless of whether or not a contract exists.

In summary, what is required is that:

In the release strategy for MRP (requisitions for goods), the strategy is only determined if the item does not have a contract.

In the release strategies for service requests, the strategy is always determined whether or not the item has a contract.

I remain attentive to your help

Percy

entry.title: Re: Preferred unit of measure
entry.content:
Hello,

Below are answers to your questions,

  1. Preferred UoM at Warehouse Level
  • Not directly maintained as “preferred UoM” per warehouse.
  • Controlled via:
    • Stock-specific UoM in Product Master (e.g., BAG).
    • Warehouse Process Type settings and Packaging Specifications.
  1. Inbound: PO in PC → Task in PAL?
  • By default, inbound tasks follow base UoM (PC).
  • To get 1 PAL = 48 PC:
    • Maintain Packaging Specification.
    • Enable HU management and auto-packing logic.
  1. Outbound: Picking Task in BAG?
  • Yes, if BAG is set as stock-specific UoM.
  • Ensure:
    • BAG is defined in Product and Warehouse Product Master.
    • Use Warehouse Process Types or Packaging Specs to enforce BAG during picking.

Summary

Task

App / Setting

Notes

Define preferred UoM

Product Master / Stock-Specific UoM

Set BAG

Inbound PAL task creation

Packaging Specification

1 PAL = 48 PC

Outbound picking in BAG

Warehouse Product / Process Type / Packaging Spec

Requires customizing

Feel free to reach out if you need further support

With regards

Chuma

entry.title: Re: German xRechnung Templates for SAP Business ByDesign
entry.content:
Hello Kristof, thank you very much for the XSLT files for processing incoming supplier invoices. The call for sending e-invoices is getting louder and louder and we would be happy if you could also provide an XSLT for sending customer invoices. The remaining standard functionality allows the sending of a PDF and a transformed XML, we now only need a suitable XSLT to be able to send invoices as X-invoices.

Best regards

Pascal

Thanks a lot for tagging me. I’ve followed you for a while, and your content is always amazing. It's a must for anyone in SAP, especially in finance and controlling.

Since you like the beaches in Barcelona, it would be awesome to see you one day here in Recife, where I live, or even in Fortaleza 😎☀️, where you’re already known as a great speaker in online events.

Grande Abraço!

entry.title: Re: How can I upload mass vendor invoices, any standard F...

Please be aware that there are hidden columns when downloading template. The field 'Partner Bank Type' should be one of the hidden columns.

Jonathan

entry.title: Extract configuration from Integration Design artifacts via API
entry.content:
Dear colleagues,

I want to build some sort of visualization of all iflows using a Scheduler and the date/time when they are going to run.

Usually the schedulers are externalized in our tenant to not require a new version and transport if we need to change it.

I used the Integration Suite APIs to access the configuration of an iFlow to see how the response looks like:

https://<tenant>.it-cpi001.cfapps.<subaccountregion>.hana.ondemand.com/api/v1/IntegrationDesigntimeArtifacts(Id='<iFlowID>',Version='<Version>')/Configurations

 And the response for the scheduler parameter is:

"ParameterKey": "Scheduler",
"ParameterValue": "simple.repeat --tz=Etc/GMT --startAt=2025-04-25T02:40:00 --endAt=2034-01-01T17:59:00",
"DataType": "custom:schedule"

Comparing with the actual configuration:

We miss important information, like the day of the week when it is scheduled... 

I could not find documentation of the information that is given in the response to understand what is possible:

Can someone suggest if there would be a better way of extracting this information or where to find more documentation?

Many thanks in advance

Best regards

Javier

PS.- If you want to use the TryOut directly in the SAP Business Accelator Hub, the url is partly hardcoded to the urls of the NEO environment, so it will not work with CF...

I left one comment using the feedback option. Hopefully it can be improved in the future, but I guess everyone uses Postman or Bruno these days 😁

entry.title: Re: Screen enhancement in IW24 (PM notification)
entry.content:
It would be helpful, when you figure things out, to share your knowledge for the benefit of those asking the same question.

thank you

entry.title: Re: Is there a way to enable ILX on the mobile app?
entry.content:
Hi @AlexC 

As per https://me.sap.com/notes/3597150, once the tenant is configure to have the 'New Learning Experience' toggle hidden, the same gets reflected in the mobile app, although there is an expected delay.

Maybe your team can test it in a Stage/Preview tenant?

entry.title: Re: how to bring consolidation group in the public cloud...
entry.content:
Hello,

in Warehouse Management in S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition the consolidation group is determined per ship-to party, route, and priority combination on level of the delivery item in shipping. 

Best regards, Tobias

entry.title: Re: SAP CPI: Not able to pick done file
entry.content:
Hello Mohit, 

The format of done file should be ${file:name}.done

Example : hello.txt is the file to be consumed, hello.txt.done is the associated .done-file.

Please check the below link for more details :

https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-integration/sap-cloud-integration/configure-sftp-sender-adapter 

 

Thanks,

Punith

entry.title: CMS SSL config and thick clients
entry.content:
I am familiarizing myself with the steps necessary to implement SSL on the CMS.  But I'm unsure about the steps for configuring thick clients, specifically IDT/UDT and Crystal Reports.

The admin guide implies that the server certs should be copied to the clients, and sslconfig run to import them.  But the SAP article that describes the process in detail specifically says that server certificates should not be used.  So I have questions:

  • Assuming the article is correct, is it true that all of the cert files have to be re-generated on the client, and none of the server certs are copied to the client?
  • This article (regarding a client connecting to multiple servers) indicates that as long as the server certs are from the same CA, then the client can connect to any server.  If true, doesn't this mean that the certs installed on the clients really have no reference to a server?  I should be able to create a single client cert, copy the files to all my clients, and use that for multiple CMSs?
  • Thinking about this more, doesn't it also mean that I need only a single server cert, even for multiple clusters?

entry.title: Re: Preferred unit of measure
entry.content:
Hello,

Thanks for raising questions on preferred unit of measure (PUoM) and stock-specific UoM. Please note that there are several influencing factors. Giving one concrete answer without knowing all settings is sometimes hard.

But back to your questions:

  1. Is it possible to maintain pref.unit of measure in warehouse level?
    1. Yes, you can e.g. maintain this in the app Warehouse Monitor using method Mass Change/Create of node Product Master Data->Warehouse Attribute.
  2.  If PO is created in 48pcs -> inbound 48 pcs -> why system creates task as 1 PAL?
    1. If only BAG is set as stock-specific, I would not expect that the warehouse task is created as 1 PAL. Is this really shown as alternative UoM of the WT if you check it in the app Warehouse Monitor?
  3. In outbound scenario, is pref. unit of measure supposed to be the unit in picking task?
    1. No. This depends on how your stock is handled during putaway. If only BAG is flagged as stock-specific, I would expect your stock in final bins will get alternative UoM BAG. 
      In outbound the stock removal strategy and stock removal rule is leading to determine the stock item to be picked. In the stock removal rule you can specify that stock item sorting should consider PUoM. Either prefer stock items in PUoM or items not having PUoM.

I hope this information helps.

Best regards, Tobias

P.S.: Please note that packaging specifications are not available in Warehouse Management in S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition.

entry.title: Re: How to Call RESTful APIs from SAP ABAP: A Step-by-Step Guide
entry.content:
For a get call if we want to fetch multiple fields then it returns only the last field in the URL. Is there a way we can get the response with specified fields?

ex - URL --https://apixxxx?fields=materialinfo&fields=prices

in postman it returns both .. but in SAP ABAP it returns only the prices

entry.title: Re: Team Fight Detection: How Team Liquid Transformed Their Analysis Process
entry.content:
Great work!
I am looking forward to see how Software can be used to analyse different playstyles even further.

entry.title: General Availability of Google Big Query Live Data Integration in SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
We are thrilled to announce the upcoming General Availability (GA) of live data integration from Google BigQuery (GBQ) into SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC). This significant milestone empowers our customers to leverage their actuals data directly from GBQ data lakes, while seamlessly incorporating it into SAC as if the data were locally replicated. This enhancement introduces data federation capabilities to SAC data models, allowing usage of GBQ data within SAC data models as if it were local, enabling enhanced analytics and decision-making.

With this new integration, our customers who use GBQ as their data lake can now leave their actuals data in GBQ, keeping their data where it naturally resides, reducing the need for additional data replication and storage management.  This is especially useful for customers who have XP&A scenarios and for business users who want to use federated data, without the assistant of a data engineer.

 

Expanded Data Access

You don’t use GBQ?    Perhaps you use something like Impala, Oracle, Snowflake or Azure data lakes instead.  GBQ is just the first step. We are committed to expanding these federation capabilities to support even more data sources and are currently working on covering all of the most popular data sources in the near future.

 

Technical Notice

As we roll out this new feature, there are a few important technical considerations to keep in mind:

 

HANA Cloud Requirement

- Your SAC tenant must be running on HANA Cloud, not HANA 2. Some customer tenants already have this configuration, but mass migration has not yet occurred. We will provide additional guidance on migration as needed.  You can check the status of your tenant by looking in the about dialog.  If it is a HANA Cloud based tenant, it will display the HANA Cloud version in this dialog.  This information will not be present on HANA 2 tenants.  More information on the migration is available here.

 

Architectural Work

- To facilitate the rapid expansion of our federated data source list, we will be conducting some architectural work on our federation infrastructure. While we do not anticipate any significant issues, there is a low probability that existing federated models created during the first quarter after the initial GA release may be impacted.

 

Note

If you create a data model with federated data access to GBQ sources prior to QRC 2025 Q3, please be aware of this potential. By QRC3, we expect to mitigate all risks associated with these architectural changes.

 

Feature Activation

Given the potential for minor disruptions, this feature will not be enabled by default. Until QRC3 2025 Q3, customers will need to raise a support ticket to have their HANA Cloud-based tenant enabled for federated access to GBQ.  Please note that this measure is not to block anyone from using this feature.  If you have a tenant that can support this feature, you can get it enabled.  We simply want to make sure that you are aware that we can’t rule out breaking any models created during the first quarter after release.  Please contact our support team for assistance.

 

Embrace the Future of Data Integration

We are excited about this step forward in data integration and look forward to bringing even more capabilities to our customers. Stay tuned for more updates and enhancements as we continue to improve SAP Analytics Cloud.

entry.title: Re: SAP Enable Now enablement: Important Updates for Consultants and Learners
entry.content:
Thank you @mikefritz for this information as there were still a lot of questions in the air and finally we have an answer. 

2 more questions:

1.- The existing learning courses (SEN100e, SEN200e, and SEN300e) will remain available even with the release of the new ones with reduced content (SEN101e and SEN201e)?

2.- All courses will remain accesible in SAP LH until the official end-of-life of SAP Enable Now?

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: DateTime in OData API response doesn't match with UI
entry.content:
@SAPSupport, can you please update your answer? The links you provided are not working anymore.

This date inconsistency still occures between API and UI even though the timezone is exactly the same (both CET in UI and API in my case), we need to understand what is the logic behind this to build an interface.

Many thanks,

Adrien

entry.title: Re: Vendor Account is not defined in Company Code while p...
entry.content: Check posting key with transaction OBXB for ANZ transaction it should usually be 29/19/A and not a vendor posting key.

entry.title: Re: Audit trail for Plant Maintenance
entry.content: Link not working. Can you please reshare?

entry.title: Re: ISNULL formula not working (Stories)
entry.content:
It needs to be inside the IF function and has a single calculation, if you try to put an "and", "or", etc., it doesn't work.
Ex. IF(ISNULL([bla#bala]), "T","F")

entry.title: convert nested JSON to ABAP
entry.content:
Hi all,

I have a JSON like:

    lv_json =
    '{"meta_data": { "version": 1, "created": 1736776103233},"series": [ [1627855200000,8994.75 ], [1627858800000,8994.75 ] ]}'.

 I created Types of:

    TYPES: BEGIN OF ty_meta_data,
             version(1) ,
             created    TYPE string.
    TYPES: END OF ty_meta_data.

    TYPES: BEGIN OF ty_single_serie,
             timestamp TYPE string,
             value     TYPE string.
    TYPES: END OF ty_single_serie.
    TYPES: tty_series TYPE TABLE OF ty_single_serie.


    TYPES: BEGIN OF ty_tageswerte,
             meta_data TYPE ty_meta_data.
    TYPES: series TYPE ty_single_serie.
    TYPES: END OF ty_tageswerte.
    DATA ls_tageswerte   TYPE ty_tageswerte.

As you can see in line 15 there must be the error --> as series is an array in the JSON
Can anybody tell me how to modify line 15 to convert the JSON array into an ABAP-Table?

The actual code (wrong ) is:

   TYPES: BEGIN OF ty_meta_data,
             version(1) ,
             created    TYPE string.
    TYPES: END OF ty_meta_data.

    TYPES: BEGIN OF ty_single_serie,
             timestamp TYPE string,
             value     TYPE string.
    TYPES: END OF ty_single_serie.
    TYPES: tty_series TYPE TABLE OF ty_single_serie.


    TYPES: BEGIN OF ty_tageswerte,
             meta_data TYPE ty_meta_data.
    types: series TYPE tty_series.
    TYPES: END OF ty_tageswerte.
    DATA ls_tageswerte   TYPE ty_tageswerte.


    BREAK wkiv1302.                                        "#EC NOBREAK

    DATA: test_tageswerte_ddic TYPE /kibf/wus_bnetza_tageswerte.
    lv_json =
    '{"meta_data": { "version": 1, "created": 1736776103233},"series": [ [1627855200000,8994.75 ], [1627858800000,8994.75 ] ]}'.

    /ui2/cl_json=>deserialize(
      EXPORTING
      json = lv_json
      CHANGING
*      data = test_tageswerte_ddic
      data = ls_tageswerte
      ).


thanks regards,

Mario

entry.title: Re: Can we use migration cockpit to change the fixed asse...
entry.content:
Hi there,

Yes, you can use the “Migrate Your Data – Migration Cockpit” Fiori app to update Fixed Asset Master Data but with some important caveats.

Here's how it works:

  • Migration Object Available: The object "Fixed Asset – Master Data" is available in the Migration Cockpit.

  • You can create new asset master records using this.

  • However, updating existing fixed assets (such as changing cost center, asset class, etc.) is not directly supported via standard migration. it’s mainly designed for initial loads during system implementation or conversion. 

For updates, consider using:

  • Mass Change tools (like transaction AR01 or apps like "Mass Change of Assets").

  • Custom LSMW/BDC programs if you're on ECC.

  • API or custom CDS-based solutions in S/4HANA for post-go-live updates.

Let me know what your use case is.

Regards,

Chuma.

entry.title: Re: DateTime in OData API response doesn't match with UI
entry.content:
Try to seach for your version:

  • Online documentation for A_OutbDeliveryHeader.
  • SAP Business Accelerator Hub for A_OutbDeliveryHeader.

(or, with luck, Wayback Machine - Internet Archive)

entry.title: Re: Advanced Intercompany Sales & Stock Transfer in SAP S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Hello,

currently there is no concrete plan to deliver multistage intercompany sales or multistage intercompany stock transfer in S4/HANA Public Cloud.

You should include SAP consulting to design workarounds for missing functionality.

Best regards,
Bernd

entry.title: Old Memo Text Appearing on Top of All Journal Entries - SAP B1 Bug?
entry.content:
Hi experts, 

I'm experiencing a strange issue in SAP Business One.
In journal entries, a specific memo line from a previous entry (for example: ZİRAAT 15002 NOLU YATIRIM KREDISI 49/108 TKST ÖDEMESİ) appears above the actual memo of the current journal entry (for example: ZİRAAT 15002 NOLU YATIRIM KREDISI 56/108 TKST ÖDEMESİ), and this happens in every journal entry.
Even though the actual memo for each entry is correct, this old memo is constantly displayed at the top of the screen for every journal entry.

It seems like some kind of system bug.
How can I fix this?
For example;

entry.title: Issue with BAPI_SALESORDER_CREATEFROMDAT2 – ITM_NUMBER error in SAP BPA
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I’m working with SAP Build Process Automation, and I’m trying to create a sales order using the BAPI_SALESORDER_CREATEFROMDAT2.

However, I consistently receive the following error:

BAPI exception: Parameter/field ITM_NUMBER doesn't have a correct data type

I’ve tried all of the following approaches to set the ITM_NUMBER field in the ORDER_ITEMS_IN structure:

  • Using a string with leading zeros: "000010"

  • Padding the string in JavaScript like this:
    itmNumber.toString().trim().padStart(6, '0')

  • Hardcoding the value directly as "000010"

  • Confirming that it’s a string, not a number

  • Making sure it's exactly 6 characters long with no extra spaces

  • Logging the output right before the BAPI call to ensure it’s correctly formatted

  • Creating a variable of type ANY in SAP BPA and assigning the value "000010"

  • Trying the value without leading zeros, i.e., just "10"

I’ve also verified that all other mandatory fields in ORDER_ITEMS_IN (such as MATERIAL, TARGET_QTY, TARGET_QU, PLANT) are filled in with valid values.

Despite these efforts, the same error persists.

Has anyone encountered this issue before? Could this be related to how SAP BPA structures the call to the BAPI or expects the table input? 

@BorisAndree Any suggestions or examples of working configurations would be greatly appreciated. Thank you in advance!

SAP Build Process Automation

entry.title: Re: Advanced Intercompany Sales & Stock Transfer in SAP S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Hi,

if you have issues with VCM you should implement the notes I have mentioned in this blog.
If this doesn't resolve your issue you should open a support ticket.

Best regards,
Bernd

entry.title: Re: DateTime in OData API response doesn't match with UI

entry.title: Field Values in Intelligent Event Processing custom event
entry.content:
There are two fields ("Event Name" and "Event Context") in the setup of a custom event via Intelligent Event Processing in Cloud ALM. Does anyone have any experience using these two fields?  I hope I can add an object name and then a condition so the event truly is 'Intelligent' in nature. 

I am aware that it is not a good practice to have all custom developed Intelligent Events, but I believe they can be quite useful.

entry.title: Ready to Deploy SAP Fieldglass? There's a Remote Service for That!
entry.content:
SAP Enterprise Support is our foundational support offering - included with your SAP cloud subscription. We deliver "Continuous quality checks" (CQCs) - a large portfolio of remote services designed to reduce technical risks or uncover optimization opportunities. These services cover a wide range of topics, each with a pre-defined scope and checks aligned to SAP best practices. At the end of each CQC, you receive an individualized report with recommendations for improvement.

CQC for Deployment Readiness for SAP Fieldglass

Starting a new project can feel exciting - but also a bit daunting. Why not boost your chances of success by ensuring the quality and stability of your SAP Fieldglass solution right from the start?

  • Want the confidence that your SAP Fieldglass environment has been thoroughly assessed before go-live? There’s a CQC for that!
  • Extending your current SAP Fieldglass suite with additional solutions from SAP?  There’s a CQC for that!
  • Interested in knowing if your SAP Fieldglass solution is functioning optimally?  There’s a CQC for that too!

Whether it’s before the go-live of a new SAP Fieldglass implementation, or when additional solutions are added to the existing SAP Fieldglass suite, or if you need a "health check" for productive SAP Fieldglass systems, the CQC for deployment readiness for SAP Fieldglass is one of many tools we provide that are “included in your cloud subscription.” You will benefit from a detailed analysis of your SAP Fieldglass solution before your go live and best practices for optimal performance and the integration of new solution after go-live.

Ready to Request Remote Services?

Begin by reviewing the CQC for Deployment Readiness for SAP Fieldglass info sheet for guidance.

Access the full list of available CQCs on SAP’s support page: Continuous Quality Check & Improvement Services .

Your Gateway to Realizing ROI

Beyond CQCs, SAP Enterprise Support offers additional resources to help you drive innovation. SAP Enterprise Support value maps provide expert-led resources, tailored recommendations, and advisory services - all included in your SAP cloud subscription. Get started:

  • One-time sign up for SAP Learning Hub, edition for SAP Enterprise Support, using a valid S-User ID (please allow up to 2 hours for processing)
  • Access SAP Enterprise Support value maps for personalized guidance
  • Request a call with our solution area experts for tailored advice

Value Maps are part of SAP Enterprise Support’s commitment to your success. Visit the SAP Enterprise Support value maps landing page to explore our range of topics and get personalized guidance for your SAP Fieldglass journey.

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

  About the author:

  • Ernestine Cosper, based in Dallas, Texas, is a Global Topic Owner for SAP Enterprise Support value maps. She’s been with SAP since 2013, holding various roles across the organization. A native of New Orleans, Ernie loves to cook, spend time with her family and dogs, and travel with her husband on his motorcycle - from Dallas all the way to Miami. Fun fact: she’s even been known to nap on the back of the bike! As she puts it:
    “My passion is your success. Moving you forward with the adoption of solutions and helping businesses navigate through SAP Enterprise Support offerings and achieve business transformation.”

Have questions, comments or feedback? Don't hesitate to comment down below or contact @Ernie_Cosper

entry.title: LOA - Termination End Handling
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

 

Just wanted to confirm if the Termination End Handling | SAP Help Portal was supported for LOA.

 

We are getting the following error: The termination end handling process can’t delimit the employee time because it’s assigned to a leave of absence time type. Please change the dates manually.

 

If not, is there any ways to automatically delimit the end date (Not the actual return date) of the LOA once we terminate and employee?

entry.title: Re: 'Requirement date' flow from 'Work Order' to its EWM 'delivery' planned delivery date
entry.content: We have the same issue in our project. In the Work Order "Requirement Date" is specified for each component but it is not transferred to the Outbound Delivery (VL03N / EWM). How can we ensure that the components are issued by the required date? Now the Planned Good issue Date is taking the Creation Delivery Date, which makes no sense. Anyone can help?

entry.title: Valuation area 5000 is already productive in the material ledgerMessage No. C+338
entry.content:
While trying to delete the plant in OX18 to deactivate Material Ledger (ML), I am encountering an error. Please help me with this issue.

Valuation area 5000 is already productive in the material ledger

Message No. C+338

Diagnosis

You are attempting to change the currency settings and valuation settings for valuation area 5000.  The Material Ledger is already productive for valuation area 5000.

System Response

To guarantee the consitency of your valuation data, this change is not allowed.

entry.title: Unable to brose tags on Plant Connectivity (PCo) UA server
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have created a OPC UA server from a socket source as below

Socket source -> Agent -> OPC UA Server

I have then created a OPC UA source system and am trying to browse tags on the OPC UA Server created as above.

I am expecting to see subscription item of the agent as one of the tags but I do not see it. I see only system tags for PCo there.

Am I missing anything?

entry.title: Re: Advanced Intercompany Sales & Stock Transfer in SAP S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Hello,

1MX - Intercompany Sales Order Processing - International

  • A lean intercompany sales process
  • No intercompany purchase order, no intercompany sales order
  • No valuated stock in transit
  • Available for several sales scenarios

5D2 - Advanced Intercompany Sales

  • A comprehensive intercompany sales process
  • Intercompany purchase order, intercompany sales order
  • Valuated stock in transit (with stock automatic postings based on transfer of control dates)
  • Currently available for sell-from-stock items

1YT - Make-to-Order Production with Variant Configuration

  • Selling a make-to-order product from an intracompany plant

7DM - Advanced Intercompany Sales - Make-to-Order and Variant Config

  • Selling a make-to-order product from an intercompany plant
  • Intercompany purchase order, intercompany sales order
  • Valuated stock in transit (with automatic stock postings based on transfer of control dates)

I'm not aware of any blog where a comparison between the scope items is available.

Best regards,
Bernd

entry.title: SAC - Data Actions - Copy Data between 2 Hierarchies (Parent to leaf)
entry.content:
Dear Gurus,

I have a question regarding copying data in SAC between 2 Hierarchies

I have 2 Hierarchies: 1 at Family level and the second one at articles level for example

I was wondering if it is possible through a data action to copy value from my parent of Hierarchy 1 to the leaf of hierarchy 2 ( Article is the leaf level of the hierarchy 2)

I know with properties it is possible but i was wondering if we could manage the copy by playing with config.hierarchy and a specific syntax in my DATA()=RESULTLOOKUP()

Regards

Julien

entry.title: Re: How to create/show hierarchy in the custom analytical query -S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content: Hello,I'm experiencing the same issue enabling the hierarchy for a custom field. Could you please share how you addressed this?

entry.title: How to request ONB 1.0 Super Admin Access Request for SuccessFactors
entry.content:
Onb Super Admin Access or also known as Onb back-end access

Consultants working on the Onboarding Implementation need this access.  Super Admin site access is required for managing the customer Account.

This request has to be raised only by the consultant certified in C-THR91 or C_THR97 with Partner S user ID via https://hcmcloudops.successfactors.com/

Customers are not allowed access to this portal, even if they try, they will get an Error “ERROR! You have logged in as user Sxxxxxxxxxx belonging to company  XXXXXX  Inc.”

Partner with P id is also not allowed to access this portal, they will get an Error “ERROR! You have logged in as user Pxxxxxxxxxx belonging to partner XXXXXX Inc”

It involves 2 simple steps

Step 1 (Customer Step)

The customer needs to send the below email to the consultant, keeping in mind a few key points

  • Must include the consultant's full name and Partner email address
  • Approval should be in English
  • Customer Approver signature needs to include full name, job position, email, and phone number
  • Attachment must be in a non-editable format, e.g. *.msg/*.eml/*.mht of the approval email.  If your organization does not use MS Outlook, then provide a screenshot(s) of the approval email and attach it to the request. MS Word or other editable documents will not be accepted

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

From:  abcd@qwer.com  (customer)
To: aaaabbbccc@xcde1234.com (consultant)

Subject: SuccessFactors ONB Super Admin Access Approval for <CUSTOMER Name>

I understand SuccessFactors adheres to strict policies concerning access to customer environments. I confirm the approval for CONSULTANT of <PARTNER COMPANY> named below to be provided ONB Super Admin access to my organization’s implementation with details below.

Customer Name: <CUSTOMER Name>
Customer ID: <CUSTOMER ID>
ONB Account Names (aka ONB Company IDs):  <ONB Account Names>
Environment(s):  <e.g., DC2 Production, DC2 Preview>
Consultant Name: Mr./Ms. AAAA  BBB  CCC 
Consultant Email: aaaabbbccc@xcde1234.com

Customer Approver's Signature:

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Step 2 (Consultant Step)

  1. Log in to https://hcmcloudops.successfactors.com/
  2. Go to the Operation Requests tab
  3. Under ONB Requests, click ONB 1.0 Super Admin Access Request
  4. Click ‘Proceed’ on the Certification Required Warning
  5. Provide the mandatory details required by the request form, such as Customer Name, ONB Account, Data Center location, and Environment, and attach the approval email and submit

For finding ONB Account, it will appear as “Account ID” in BizX Provisioning> Company Settings > Onboarding Settings

https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/2397304

entry.title: Re: Not getting automatic roundoff in FB60
entry.content:
Hello Ganesh,

The tolerance group settings and automatic postings for rounding differences configuration apply during payment processing or open item clearing and not during invoice posting itself (in FB60 or Post Incoming Invoices Fiori app).

Reason: during invoice entry (FB60 or Post Incoming Invoices app), SAP requires the document to balance exactly — line item totals must match the header amount. If they don’t, you’ll get:

"Posting only possible with zero balance."

This is standard system behavior to enforce double-entry integrity, and no tolerance setting can override this at invoice entry time.

Warm regards,

Maciej

entry.title: Re: How to generate a hierarchy based data from flat data...
entry.content: Check Capire ​​https://cap.cloud.sap/docs/advanced/odata#hierarchical-transformations and our sample application https://github.com/SAP-samples/cloud-cap-samples-java where we have a working demo of the hierarchical data.

entry.title: Re: Valuation area 5000 is already productive in the mate...
entry.content: Read (carefully) KBA 3037221 - OX18: Prevent copy/deletion of company code <-> plant assignment if the assigned valuation area has material ledger active

entry.title: Re: Enforce a secure re-authentication for each new SAP GUI connection, with SAP Secure Login Servic
entry.content:
Hi Nelis,

We have the configuration parameter "allowBrowserSSO" that can be used to run the built-in browser of Secure Login Client in a private mode. You could try if this is enough to prevent the Entra Id logon page from picking up any existing token. If it doesn't help then maybe you can define a dedicated policy on Entra Id that always triggers the full authentication.

Best regards,
Christian

entry.title: Re: SAP DM - Roles, Spaces & Groups
entry.content:
Hi @it10 ,

you can't modify the apps that are included in a role template. 

Best,

Mike

entry.title: Re: SAP DM - Roles, Spaces & Groups
entry.content:
Hi @it10 ,

you can't modify the apps included in a role template. 

Best,

Mike

entry.title: Re: Can we load data From Multiple Odata Queries to Single Planning model ?
entry.content: Yes, but. In a account model that is possible but in a measure (new model) that won't be possible until you get release 2025.7. The ability to combine queries was not possible until this release. But with 2025.7 Just like for account models, SAP Analytics Cloud now allows for combining multiple data sources during data preparation of models. This is available either via data import, or when transforming the data foundation data after you have created a model.

entry.title: Re: How can I undeploy a specific field from a table in SAP HANA?
entry.content: Do you keep `managed` on db entity? While you have the definition, field should be present to match it. Projection just models a view on the db entity.

entry.title: Custom data against SFC in SAP DM
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

is there any way to bind custom data against SFC,

use case - we need to maintain the vendor custom number with SFC number so is there any way we can maintain the custom data tags against SFC. 

can anyone please help us that how we can overcome this challenge to in SAP DM.


Regards,
Ankit Gupta

entry.title: Re: Multitenant App is not able to load $metadata of backend service (401 Unauthorized)
entry.content: On the backend side check that the request that triggers 401 has some kind of authentication with it. E.g. JWT token. Also check that your applications connected to the same identity service instances. Your destination configuration can be wrong: `Authentication: NoAuthentication` and `forwardAuthToken: true` are kinda contradictory.

entry.title: Re: Error while Enabling Advance GL Account option - the...
entry.content:
Hi,

Check the GA link in the KBA 3395055. Go to the Migration Issues and check for the topic Migration fails and you will find the explanation you are looking for.

Kr,

Jitin

entry.title: Re: EMIGALL Cook book
entry.content: Try this: https://help.sap.com/doc/910f0b0cd5b740d6b0d8e0b1c97c2e89/1.0/en-US/Data%20Migration%20of%20FI-CA-Based%20Industry%20Solutions.pdf - it worked for me.
